title: Initiation of 3 tasks

title: Abnormal parallelism in agent tasks
description: All three tasks (Fix missing model name tag, Implement real private mode, and Centralize .locked file enforcement across MCP and Dash) are spawned and started in parallel by the agent, which may indicate overcommitting resources.

title: Task spawning by autonomous system

title: Agent and autonomous system synchronization
description: There is a correlation between the Autonomous system's initiation of tasks (Fix missing model name tag, Implement real private mode, and Centralize .locked file enforcement across MCP and Dash) and Agent starting the same tasks in parallel.

title: Agent GC runs every minute
